name: MSI IPC MS-CF05-SKU2 ATX Industrial Motherboard - Socket LGA1700 - Intel Q670E Chipset - DDR5-4400 - 2x PCIe x16 - 4x PCIe x4 - 2x Intel 2.5GbE LAN - 2x M.2 Slot - SATA RAID 0/1/5/10 - VGA - HDMI - DisplayPort - USB 3.2 Gen 2 - COM RS-485 (911-CF05-102)
